ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rainfall_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the rainfall data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data was collected */,
  "cumulative_rainfall_month_to_date" REAL /* Cumulative rainfall for the month to date in millimeters */,
  "historical_average_cumulative_rainfall" REAL /* Historical average of cumulative monthly rainfall in millimeters */,
  "daily_rainfall" REAL /* Daily rainfall in millimeters */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the specific location where the data was collected */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the specific location where the data was collected */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location where the data was collected */,
  "measurement_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the measurement station */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the rainfall data (e.g., satellite, ground station) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "region_id", "measurement_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Average latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Average longitude of the region */,
  "elevation_range" TEXT /* Range of elevations within the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the region (e.g., tropical, temperate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* HTTP request method used (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  "response_status" INTEGER /* HTTP response status code */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to respond to the request in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
